title: phlomoides iliensis
intro: Phlomoides iliensis, also known as Iliensis Marsh Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides iliensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides iliensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
